skills.name: autoplan
skills.description: Auto-review pipeline — runs CEO, design, and eng reviews sequentially with auto-decisions
skills.notes: Reads all three review skills from disk and chains them. Uses gstack-config for persistent settings and gstack-review-log for review dashboard.

skills.name: benchmark
skills.description: Performance regression detection — baselines page load, Core Web Vitals, and resource sizes via browse daemon
skills.notes: Heavy browse usage for performance measurement. Cannot work without the browse daemon.

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Headless browser for QA, screenshots, and site testing (~100ms per command)
skills.notes: The browse daemon itself. All browse-dependent skills require this.

skills.name: canary
skills.description: Post-deploy canary monitoring — watches live app for console errors, perf regressions, and page failures
skills.notes: Takes periodic screenshots and compares against pre-deploy baselines via browse.

skills.name: careful
skills.description: Safety guardrails — warns before rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push, and other destructive commands
skills.notes: Pure hook skill. Uses a shell script to check bash commands. No gstack preamble, no browse.

skills.name: codex
skills.description: OpenAI Codex CLI wrapper — code review, adversarial challenge, and consult modes
skills.notes: Core logic shells out to the codex CLI. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly without gstack.

skills.name: cso
skills.description: Chief Security Officer mode — infrastructure-first security audit with OWASP, STRIDE, and supply chain scanning
skills.notes: Core logic is codebase analysis and markdown reporting. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly.

skills.name: design-consultation
skills.description: Design system creation — researches landscape, proposes typography/color/layout, generates preview pages
skills.notes: Core logic is prompt-driven design thinking. Optional browse for research screenshots. Works without browse.

skills.name: design-review
skills.description: Visual QA — finds spacing issues, hierarchy problems, AI slop, then iteratively fixes with before/after screenshots
skills.notes: Heavy browse usage for screenshots and visual comparison. Core workflow requires the browse daemon.

skills.name: document-release
skills.description: Post-ship documentation update — syncs README, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG, and TODOS to match what shipped
skills.notes: Core logic is reading docs and diffs, writing updated markdown. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly.

skills.name: freeze
skills.description: Restrict file edits to a specific directory for the session
skills.notes: Pure hook skill. Blocks Edit and Write outside the allowed path. No gstack preamble.

skills.name: gstack-upgrade
skills.description: Upgrade gstack to the latest version and show what changed
skills.notes: By definition requires gstack to be installed in order to upgrade it.

skills.name: guard
skills.description: Full safety mode — combines /careful (destructive command warnings) with /freeze (directory-scoped edits)
skills.notes: Pure hook skill combining careful and freeze. No gstack preamble.

skills.name: investigate
skills.description: Systematic debugging with root cause investigation — investigate, analyze, hypothesize, implement
skills.notes: Core logic is code exploration and structured debugging. Uses freeze hooks for safety. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly.

skills.name: land-and-deploy
skills.description: Land and deploy workflow — merges PR, waits for CI, verifies production health via canary checks
skills.notes: Uses gstack-config for deploy settings and gstack-diff-scope for change analysis. Browse for post-deploy verification.

skills.name: office-hours
skills.description: YC-style brainstorming — problem diagnosis, premise challenge, design doc output
skills.notes: Core logic is prompt-driven brainstorming and markdown output. Optional browse for sketch preview. Works fully without browse.

skills.name: plan-ceo-review
skills.description: CEO/founder-mode plan review — rethink the problem, find the 10-star product, challenge premises
skills.notes: Core logic is plan analysis and structured critique. Uses gstack-review-log for dashboard but works without it.

skills.name: plan-design-review
skills.description: Designer's eye plan review — rates each design dimension 0-10, explains what would make it a 10
skills.notes: Core logic is plan analysis and design critique. Uses gstack-review-log for dashboard but works without it.

skills.name: plan-eng-review
skills.description: Eng manager-mode plan review — architecture, data flow, edge cases, test coverage, performance
skills.notes: Core logic is plan analysis and engineering critique. Uses gstack-review-log for dashboard but works without it.

skills.name: qa
skills.description: Systematic QA testing with iterative bug fixing — three tiers from quick to exhaustive
skills.notes: Heavy browse usage for testing web applications. Core workflow requires the browse daemon.

skills.name: qa-only
skills.description: Report-only QA testing — structured bug report with screenshots but no fixes
skills.notes: Heavy browse usage for testing and screenshots. Same browse dependency as /qa but read-only.

skills.name: retro
skills.description: Weekly engineering retrospective with commit analysis, work patterns, and trend tracking
skills.notes: Core logic is git log analysis and markdown reporting. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly.

skills.name: review
skills.description: Pre-landing PR review — analyzes diff for SQL safety, trust boundary violations, and structural issues
skills.notes: Uses gstack-review-log for review dashboard and gstack-diff-scope for change analysis beyond preamble.

skills.name: setup-browser-cookies
skills.description: Import cookies from real browser into headless browse session for authenticated testing
skills.notes: Requires browse daemon to import cookies into. Pure browse infrastructure skill.

skills.name: setup-deploy
skills.description: Configure deployment settings — detects platform, production URL, health checks, writes config to CLAUDE.md
skills.notes: Core logic is detecting deploy platform and writing configuration. Gstack preamble fails harmlessly.

skills.name: ship
skills.description: Ship workflow — merge base, run tests, review diff, bump VERSION, update CHANGELOG, commit, push, create PR
skills.notes: Uses gstack-review-read, gstack-diff-scope, and gstack-config extensively for the ship pipeline.

skills.name: unfreeze
skills.description: Clear freeze boundary — allow edits to all directories again
skills.notes: Pure utility skill. Removes the freeze state file. No gstack preamble.

skills.name: skill-status
skills.description: Reports on the skill catalog — counts by portability, checks profile match, verifies gstack version
skills.notes: Project-local skill. Reads skills-catalog.json and profiles/. No external dependencies.
